description: Non-technical music academy owner seeking online presence advice

turns.user: I am running a music academy but now I want to make an online presence as well
I want more people to discover the academy online and maybe enroll without visiting physically
Do I need a full custom platform, or would a simple website be enough to start with?
I'm not technical at all. What would you recommend?
If you were advising your own client, what would you recommend in the next 3 months?
What makes Boolmind different from Wix or hiring a freelancer?
If a custom platform costs $5000, how would you calculate whether it's worth it?
